  • West Africa

West Africa

West Africa is best approached through culture, heritage, coastlines, and slower travel.

This region rewards travelers who value music, food, Atlantic history, and diaspora connections more than a checklist safari route.

Regional overview

West Africa is driven by heritage journeys, winter-sun escapes, coastal cities, and community-grounded experiences. Ghana and Senegal are the most polished starting points, while Benin, Sierra Leone, and Cabo Verde broaden the offer considerably.

These countries offer the clearest leisure pathways for heritage, beaches, island breaks, and cultural travel.

Use this page to

  • Compare the countries in West Africa that are most suitable for visitors.
  • Open a country landing page for practical travel context.
  • Jump onward into attractions, stays, and restaurants from the right country base.

Countries

Countries in West Africa

Every country links to its own landing page with a general overview, featured attractions, tour operators, stays, and restaurants.

West Africa

Ghana

Ghana is one of West Africa’s easiest entry points, combining strong hospitality, heritage travel, Atlantic coast sites, and a vibrant contemporary cultural scene.

Country guide
View Details

West Africa

Senegal

Senegal offers one of the region’s most polished cultural travel experiences, balancing Dakar’s urban energy with coastal heritage and softer delta landscapes.

Country guide
View Details

West Africa

Benin

Benin is small but rich in heritage, especially for travelers interested in Ouidah, Ganvié, royal history, and the living traditions of Vodun culture.

Country guide
View Details

West Africa

Sierra Leone

Sierra Leone is an emerging leisure destination known for uncrowded beaches, warm hospitality, and a still-lightly-developed coastline.

Country guide
View Details

West Africa

Cabo Verde

Cabo Verde combines island leisure, winter sun, water sports, and relatively easy resort logistics for travelers who want a lighter Atlantic break.

Country guide
View Details

Featured attractions

High-interest attractions in West Africa

Ghana

Cape Coast & Kakum

Atlantic heritage castles paired with rainforest canopy walks.

★ 4.7 (429) From $18
Central Ghana
View Details

Senegal

Sine-Saloum Delta

A softer Senegal route of waterways, birdlife, and lodge-based slow travel.

★ 4.6 (202) From $40
Coastal Senegal
View Details

Benin

Ouidah & Ganvié

A compact heritage route linking Atlantic history with the famous stilt village.

★ 4.5 (176) From $26
Southern Benin
View Details

Sierra Leone

Tokeh & River No. 2 Beach

An easy Sierra Leone coast escape with striking beaches and a laid-back mood.

★ 4.6 (148) From $14
Freetown Peninsula
View Details

Cabo Verde

Sal Island

Reliable winter sun, beaches, and water sports.

★ 4.5 (564) From $22
Cabo Verde
